properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sometimes I wonder, is He faithful? Does He see me in my trouble? Does He understand? Sometimes I question if He's able Can He rescue, can He save me Again and again? But when I look back

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Did He move every mountain? Did He part every sea? Yes, He did So yes, He can, oh Did He defeat the darkness? Did He deliver me? Yes, He did So yes, He can Whoa, yes, He did So yes, He can

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: 'Cause sometimes those voices try to tell me I'm forgotten, and I've fallen Too far from His hands But I know what kind of God He is And I'm trusting in His promises I'm believing and I'm singing Yes, He can Whoa

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: 'Cause I've seen too much, now I can't deny He's come through every single time From the beginning until the end He did, He will, He can Now, ooh

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Did He move every mountain? Did He part every sea? Yes, He did So yes, He can, oh Did He defeat the darkness? Did He deliver me? Yes, He did So yes, He can (movin' a mountain) Did He move every mountain? (Part the sea) Did He part every sea? Yes, He did (oh yes, He did) So yes, He can, oh (oh)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Did He defeat the darkness? (He set me free) Did He deliver me? Yes, He did (oh, I know He will) So yes, He can (oh, I know He can) Whoa, yes, He did (I know that He can) So yes, He can Yes, He did Yes, He can
